title: BrincFi - Rekt Cold Case
relevance_summary: Admin privilege abuse leading to token drain and ETH theft via contract upgrade

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers ownership of a contract to an external address and immediately upgrades the contract to a new implementation.

red_flags: transfer of ownership to external address
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that transfers ownership of a contract to an external address and immediately upgrades the contract to a new implementation.
summary: The BrincFi hack involved transferring ownership of the staking contract to an attacker's wallet and then upgrading it to a malicious implementation, allowing the attacker to drain tokens and ETH. A guard could have detected and blocked this by monitoring for transfers of contract ownership followed by immediate contract upgrades.
